movie.actors: Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus, Billy Connolly, Clifton Collins Jr.
movie.plot: For the last 8 years the brothers have been living with their father on a sheep farm deep in isolated Ireland. One day their uncle tells them that they have been framed for the murder of a Bostonian Catholic priest. The boys must return to Boston to not only clear their names but find the men who framed them.
movie.title: The Boondock Saints II: All Saints Day
movie.writer: Troy Duffy (screenplay), Troy Duffy (story), Taylor Duffy (story)
